sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
purple = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'p']

print(f"Green: {len(green)}")
for g in green:
    b = g['boundary']
    min_r = min(pt[0] for pt in b)
    min_c = min(pt[1] for pt in b)
    print(f"  ({min_r},{min_c})")

print(f"Purple: {len(purple)}")
for p in purple:
    b = p['boundary']
    min_r = min(pt[0] for pt in b)
    min_c = min(pt[1] for pt in b)
    print(f"  ({min_r},{min_c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Reset game over
action(['ACTION7'])

# Check initial state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Initial: Green={len(green)}")

# Execute the sequence to reach the new state
actions = []
top_row = 25
bottom_row = 31
cols = [13, 19, 25, 31, 37, 43, 49]

# Click on top row
for c in cols:
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': top_row, 'col': c})

# Move RIGHT to end
for i in range(5):
    actions.append('RIGHT')

# Click on bottom row from right to left
for c in reversed(cols):
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': bottom_row, 'col': c})

action(actions)

# Check state after transition
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"After transition: Green={len(green)}")
for g in green:
    b = g['boundary']
    min_r = min(pt[0] for pt in b)
    min_c = min(pt[1] for pt in b)
    print(f"  ({min_r},{min_c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
